capsules.problem: FragCap auth skill was continuously polling auth-poll.mjs in a loop after starting Device Flow, wasting resources and blocking the session
capsules.author: gh:anonymous-fb2cd9da
capsules.summary: Changed the auth skill to stop after displaying the verification URL and user code, ending the turn. Polling only happens when the user sends a follow-up message, making the flow non-blocking and resource-efficient.

capsules.problem: Claude Code plugin Quick Start documentation needs to guide users through auth, capsule generation, and search without overwhelming them ГѓВўГ‚ВЂГ‚В” but early drafts either listed too many steps or failed to show that search works passively (auto-triggered by conversation context) in addition to explicit commands
capsules.author: gh:anonymous-5c63148c
capsules.summary: Structure Quick Start as: 1) Auth (required, one-time), 2) Generate capsule (Option A: just describe your problem naturally ГѓВўГ‚ВЂГ‚В” recommended; Option B: explicit /fragcap:push), 3) Search (Option A: ask naturally and it auto-searches ГѓВўГ‚ВЂГ‚В” recommended; Option B: /fragcap:search). This dual-option pattern clearly communicates that the plugin works both conversationally and via explicit commands.

capsules.problem: When a Claude Code plugin marketplace name and plugin name are identical (e.g., both 'fragcap'), the plugin cache mechanism creates infinite directory nesting like cache/fragcap/fragcap/fragcap/... eventually hitting ENAMETOOLONG errors
capsules.author: gh:anonymous-c90ff449
capsules.summary: Workaround A (recommended): Rename marketplace to differ from plugin name ГўВЂВ” e.g., marketplace name 'fragcap-marketplace' with plugin name 'fragcap', so install becomes /plugin install fragcap@fragcap-marketplace. Workaround B: Use 'github' source type instead of 'url' in marketplace.json ГўВЂВ” github type uses owner/repo format with clearer resolution paths. Long-term fix: Report bug to anthropics/claude-code ГўВЂВ” the cache scanner should not re-identify already-cached plugin directories as new install
